events.title: George Michael would be 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. Born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou on June 25, 1963, he rose to fame with Wham! before a hugely successful solo career.

angles.name: George Michael tribute
angles.copy: Today, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. What's your favourite track from the pop icon?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson. Born in 1958, he would have been 68 this year.

angles.name: MJ tribute
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His music continues to move generations. What's the one song that always takes you back?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Happy 86th birthday to The Beatles' legendary drummer, Ringo Starr! Born Richard Starkey on July 7, 1940, he’s a true icon of music.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his solo work, his beat is unmistakable.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today. Born on July 19, 1947, his legendary riffs have defined rock for decades.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the absolute legend that is Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today. Born on July 26, 1943, he continues to defy age.

angles.name: Jagger's Milestone
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape. The first video ever played was 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV's big birthday
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, a channel launched that changed music forever. MTV hit our screens for the first time! What was your favourite music video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was officially released on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop and a UK chart-topper.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. Which track still gives you chills?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing together nearly half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, a generation found its voice at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in music history.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley. Born in 1935, he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis tribute
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the world lost Elvis Presley. His music and legacy live on, forever the King.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of rap icon Tupac Shakur. Born on June 16, 1971, he would have been 55 this year. He was fatally shot on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years on, Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture is still immense. His words and beats resonate as strongly as ever.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix. Born on November 27, 1942, he would have been 84 this year. He passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. His guitar changed the world.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album, that cover... pure timeless brilliance.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders! Born on September 7, 1951, she's a true rock icon.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those powerful vocals and sharp lyrics.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Born on September 21, 1972, the Oasis frontman continues to be a force in British music.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK on October 24, 1975. The album came out earlier, on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and unity.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, making it available on November 10, 2001. It revolutionised how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod's Big Quarter Century
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled? The device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would be 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. Born October 9, 1940, his legacy as a Beatle and solo artist is immense.

angles.name: Lennon's enduring spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and music of John Lennon. A true visionary whose work continues to inspire.
